coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 2 Tremor
At 3+ Charge Count, reuse this Coin if it lands Heads (Up to 2 times)
If the Coin is reused twice, inflict Tremor, then trigger Tremor Burst
After Tremor Burst, reduce Tremor Count by 1

[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 2 Tremor
At 3+ Charge Count, reuse this Coin if it lands Heads (Up to 2 times)
Inflict 2 more Tremor each time the Coin is reused
If the Coin is reused twice, inflict Tremor, then trigger Tremor Burst
After Tremor Burst, reduce Tremor Count by 1

descs.desc: If target has 10+ Tremor Count, Coin Power +1

[OnSucceedAttackHead] Inflict 2 Tremor
[OnSucceedAttack] Trigger Tremor Burst.

[OnSucceedAttack] Trigger Tremor Burst.

[OnSucceedAttack] If target is Staggered, deal 25% of damage dealt as bonus damage

1090501.name: Here’s to Getting Off Early~
1090501.desc:
On [VibrationExplosion], spend 3 Charge Count to increase the Stagger Threshold raise by +40%.
After triggering [VibrationExplosion], gain 1 Haste and 1 Blunt DMG Up next turn.

1090521.name: Resonant Spanner
1090521.desc: When 1 ally with the slowest Speed triggers [VibrationExplosion], increase the Stagger Threshold raise by +20%.
